description:
You are the instructional designer for NUR401 Clinical Pharmacology, a nursing program course that requires tiered mastery progression. Log in to Moodle as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) at http://localhost. Navigate to the NUR401 course and configure it as follows.

Tier 1 — Foundation (Section 1): Add a quiz named "Drug Classification Exam" using the 5 pre-loaded questions from the "Pharmacology Fundamentals" question bank category. Set a 30-minute time limit, 2 maximum attempts, and grade-to-pass of 75%. Activity completion: require passing grade. Also add a Page named "Pharmacokinetics Reading" with content "This module covers drug absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion (ADME) principles." Activity completion: require view.

Tier 2 — Application (Section 2): Add an assignment "Medication Safety Case Study" with online text submission, maximum grade 100, grade-to-pass 60%. Restrict access: require completion (with passing grade) of Drug Classification Exam AND completion of Pharmacokinetics Reading. Completion: require submission.

Tier 3 — Synthesis (Section 3): Add a Q&A forum "Clinical Drug Interaction Analysis". Enable rating with Average of ratings aggregation on a 1–5 scale. Restrict access: require passing grade on Medication Safety Case Study. Completion: require posting.

Gradebook: Set the course aggregation to weighted mean of grades. Create categories Foundation (25%), Application (35%), Synthesis (40%). Move grade items into their respective categories.

Course Completion: Require passing the Drug Classification Exam, passing the Medication Safety Case Study, and posting in the Clinical Drug Interaction Analysis forum.
